programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Close Calls

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Reunited

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Weather the Storm
programme.desc: Jamie Davis and the cast look back and some of their biggest battles with Mother Nature. Al, Merv, Colin, James and Ken Duperon share how extreme weather has impacted recoveries. Plus: a tribute to one of Jamie's original crewmembers.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Major Situation
programme.desc: Sonny needs to pull off an urgent recovery with all eyes on him. A tight recovery puts Duncan right up against a live lane of traffic. Gary's crew takes on the last big rollover of the winter as a blast of frigid weather makes the job more difficult.

programme.desc: A 22-year-old college student is found raped and strangled on a Buffalo bike path.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Million Dollar Murder
programme.desc: To solve the murder of a Texas multi-million playboy, police dig deep into the heart of Millionaire's Row.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Thrill Kill
programme.desc: Phoenix police are faced with a unique serial killer team who get their thrills stalking and shooting innocents.

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Shopping Spree Killer
programme.desc: Elderly women are brutally slain within the secure walls of a gated community of Canyon Lake, California. The violence is so shocking that investigators fear there's a psychopathic serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Intervention: Amber
programme.desc: Amber was a star hockey goalie in her youth, but a horrific injury led to a dependence on pain medication. Now, she is addicted to cocaine, alcohol and morphine.

programme.title: Intervention: Mike
programme.desc: Mike was a loving dad and partner, but a workplace accident led to an addiction to prescription painkillers. After his family left him, he turned to heroin. His current partner Collette fears that he will die without an intervention.

programme.title: Intervention: Leslie
programme.desc: Leslie is a Sunday school teacher, PTA member, soccer mom of three and a raging alcoholic. After countless arrests and DUIs her husband is hoping to find help for the mother of his children before it's too late.

programme.title: Intervention: Jason
programme.desc: Jason was born to a strict Southern Baptist family, and when his mother revealed she was a lesbian they were banished from the church. Left with no supervision, Jason turned to drugs and alcohol.

programme.title: Intervention: Casie
programme.desc: Once a successful hairstylist, Casie now works in a salon to fuel her $500-a-week meth habit. Her mother tries to make up for Casie's difficult childhood by enabling her, even at the cost of her own marriage.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joni and Millie
programme.desc: Child Protective Services had to take Joni's granddaughter away from her because of her hoarding. Also, Millie has already tried to clean up her act, only to relapse and start hoarding again. Daughter Chelsea has one last ultimatum for her.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Learn how the art department rigged the automatic salad dispenser, which Joker was sick during filming and how the audio team recorded customers at the drive-thru.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Roadtrip to Whiskey Castle
programme.desc: The boys hit the road to visit a whiskey tasting at a castle. Road tricks and magic pit stops abound. Plus, The Great Ramsini visits the supermarket, Wes slingshots a balloon, and Alex's illusion shatters expectations.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Ramsay's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Wes, Eric and Alex celebrate Chris Ramsay's birthday with tricks, surprises and a shocking birthday cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe try to find house sitters for bizarre homes and pose as researchers studying grocery shopping habits. Later, the big loser has a run-in at the drive-thru with astonished customers.

programme.title: The Problem With Apu
programme.desc: Indian American comedian, Hari Kondabolu, takes a journalistic deep dive into 'The Simpsons' character Apu to find out how and why this stereotypical character has managed to stick around for so long.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Spaghetti and Meatballs Episode
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Tacos with Guy Episode
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Big Time Blunders
programme.desc: Watch what happens when a very public marriage proposal backfires, find out whether cats are better than dogs and learn the best ways to improve your dating profile.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Surprises
programme.desc: Watch what happens when two guys pull $10,000 out of people's hair.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Suburbs
programme.desc: Adam explains that your lawn is an unnatural monstrosity, suburban design is killing you, and the racist past of suburbs led to segregation in schools.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Economy
programme.desc: Adam explains why doing taxes is unnecessarily complicated, the economic numbers we hear don't reveal much, and American manufacturing can't return.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: The guys pose as crummy cashiers at a grocery store and then play with laser pointers at a mall. Plus, tonight's loser gets soaked with embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Essence of the Wings
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Relax the Back

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.desc: A rare inflammatory disease brings a woman to the doctors for advice. A patient longs for the abs he can't seem to naturally acquire. An overseas client hopes for a boob job, having survived a near-death experience in the operating room.

programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps an eating disorder survivor feel beautiful in her own skin by downsizing her breasts, while Dr. Nassif sends a 'dinosaur' nose back to the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Botched: Melting Mounds and Unlucky Charms

programme.title: Botched: A Revision Runs Through It

programme.title: Botched: Cougars and Cobras and Boobs ... Oh My!
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif wrangles a cougar's cobra neck while Dr. Dubrow helps a desperate patient downsize her triple D's. Later, he puts Dr. Nassif under the knife.

programme.title: Botched: Witchy Whips and Super High Nips
programme.desc: An evil witch wants sexy cat eyes and gives the doctors a taste of her dominatrix ways. A surgery in Tijuana left a woman with stomach scars and nipples by her collarbone.

programme.title: Botched: Flaws, Jaws, and Extra Bra
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps give a three-boobed woman the perfect pair and Dr. Nassif works to correct a car accident victim's mangled nose. Meanwhile, a 27-year-old LA socialite with jacked up jowls wants a facelift.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truth or Chair

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rent Controlled
programme.desc: Todd offers to help Savannah purchase a home, but there are strings attached. Meanwhile, Grayson's monthly phone bill gets him in hot water with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The House That Todd Built
programme.desc: Todd signs the family up with a local charity in order to teach the kids about giving back to the community. Grayson's school project causes a rift between Todd and Faye over their heritage.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Very Grisly Chrisley
programme.desc: The Chrisleys enter a Halloween decorating contest. Lindsie tells her family about her relationship with Will.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Client-Hell

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bunions, Bulldogs and Hedgehogs, Oh My!

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Market Crash

programme.desc: After renting his whole life, a local pastor is ready to settle down in a house that will give him enough space for his cooking and gardening hobbies.

programme.title: Home Town: The Move of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Robyn and Cassidy want to move Robyn's great-grandmother's house to a new plot of land, but Ben and Erin are sceptical that the home could survive the move.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
programme.desc: A family that owns a local brewery purchased an older home rich with history, but the outdated rooms and obsolete features create many challenges. Dave and Jenny add creative and personal touches like a custom, handmade beer tap.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs help a woman turn her historic 1905 home into a beautiful Victorian retreat. But they have their work cut out for them with its shoddy, unfinished contracting work throughout the living room, kitchen, master bedroom and back porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic House Gets Pretty Pink Overhaul
programme.desc: After seeing overhaul they did on her parent's house, a woman moving back to Bentonville knows that Dave and Jenny can create her dream home, too. The Marrs use her love of pink to craft the ultimate starter home that she'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Family House with History
programme.desc: A couple with a 19th-century home want it updated to fit their lifestyle. Dave and Jenny renovate the space while preserving its historic charm.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Victorian Hodgepodge Gets Modern Makeover
programme.desc: After moving 20 times in 28 years, a couple is ready to make the move into a recently purchased Victorian their last. The rooms are a hash of renovations past, so Dave and Jenny Marrs help turn this house into a modern home where they'll want to stay.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Dream House Redo
programme.desc: Homeowners who still consider their house of 20 years to be their dream home ask Jenn to give its outdated spaces a major facelift. Next, Jenn works with a couple to create a bedroom suite retreat after years of putting their kids' needs first.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Hello Yellow
programme.desc: Jenn carves out more work and storage space for a growing family that incorporates their favorite color: yellow. Next, she helps a mom who regularly hosts gatherings update her 20-year-old home with a welcoming living area and entertainer's kitchen.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Glam Guest House
programme.desc: A couple who bought their home eight years ago loved the layout but not the look, so Jenn gives them a Cape Cod-style makeover that works for their entire family. Then, Jenn transforms a plain pool house into a glam guesthouse that's ideal for visitors.

programme.title: Movie: Pool Boy Nightmare

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: Captured
programme.desc: A couple finds massive footprints near Nancy Lake. Strange lights circle above Fairbanks in coordinated patterns, shocking witnesses. A picturesque rainbow camouflages an extraterrestrial teleportation device.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: Alien Flight Plan

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: They Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Hunters unearth new clues about Bigfoot's cosmic origins. An Air Force veteran receives a shocking response when he reports UFO activity over Fairbanks. Piercing lights from above disrupt a late-night party near Wasilla, Alaska.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: RC/ DC
programme.desc: Rock on with the Pawn Stars when a signed AC/DC album electrifies the shop. Then, Rick gets fired up over a Beals Model Remington revolver. Later, when Rich wants to find new ways to advertise the pawn shop, he thinks small to get big results.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Broadsiding Lincoln
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with one of the most sought after items in American history: a John Wilkes Booth wanted poster. A guy buzzes the shop with a fighter pilot's G-suit.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buffalo Bull
programme.desc: President Ronald Reagan's high school yearbook comes into the shop, complete with a signed letter from 'The Gipper'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Some Like It Not
programme.desc: A guy marches in with a sword from the Civil War, and Rick and Corey check out a collection of paintings by actor Tony Curtis.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Colts and Vikings
programme.desc: Go great guns with the Pawn Stars when a Colt Army model 1860 shoots into the shop. Then, Rick sets his sights on a Viking coin.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Playboys and Players
programme.desc: A collection of Playboy Club memorabilia hops into the shop. Then, Corey and Chum check out a pair or old Murray bicycles, one of which has never been ridden. Later, the Old Man decides to go to the shooting range, but Rick thinks he needs some back up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Flying High
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are ready to rock when a guitar that has been signed by Garry Tallent arrives. Then, Rick has a look at a replica 1964 Peace Dollar. Later, Rick challenges Chum to a paper airplane contest.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Presidential Pawn
programme.desc: Brush up on some history with the Pawn Stars when a signed handwritten letter from Founding Father, James Monroe, arrives at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick Gets Axed
programme.desc: Corey and Chum hope to be the heroes when a piece of artwork from the original 1995 Batman- Spiderman crossover comic arrives at the shop. Then, Rick gets a look at a Revolutionary War halberd.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: King of Pawntus
programme.desc: Dig up some history with the Pawn Stars when an ancient coin comes rolling into the shop. Will Rick walk away with this shiny silver in his pocket or will he end up empty handed?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: E Equals MC Pawn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars make calculated moves when some handwritten math by Albert Einstein could multiply their profits. Chumlee tries to prove he isn't dim when he pays big bucks to have an antique headlamp tester shining brightly once again.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnie and Clyde
programme.desc: A set of illustrations from Disney's 'Sleeping Beauty' prompt Chum to make a sketchy deal that draws lots of attention. Flashy door handles from one of Las Vegas' first casinos has Rick feeling like he won the jackpot.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Revolutionary Rick!
programme.desc: The 500th episode of the series finds Rick in the nation's capital. A set of silver spoons made by Paul Revere is a rare find. Back at 'Gold and Silver,' a conversational candle prop from 'H.R. Pufnstuf' creates intrigue.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Some Serious Coinage
programme.desc: A sale of the first American coin ever made has Rick thinking it was 'mint' to be, but at a serious cost. Corey and Chum envision a future for an antique 'Jetsons' cartoon lunchbox that is zooming across their counter. Rick gets ancient self-help.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Happiest Place to Pawn
programme.desc: An anti-war speech signed by Dr. Martin Luther King stuns Rick and Corey. Rick and Chum check out a remote-controlled miniature version of a Disney Jungle Cruise ride's boat. A German 'Blue Max' medal from WWI has Rick itchy to justify the seller's price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: In the Presence of Greatness
programme.desc: A Batman utility belt toy from the 1960s is within Rick and Chum's grasp. An impeccable Mosrite electric guitar could be a sweet deal for the shop. Rick continues to search for 'The Object,' an item featured on the cover of Led Zeppelin's 'Presence.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Game of Pawns
programme.desc: Winter is coming when Rick sees an autographed Game of Thrones item. Then, Chumlee stirs up commotion with an Amazonian blowgun, and picker Spencer Victory stops by with an ancient Middle Eastern sword. Later, Rick checks out a 1900s DNC collectible.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Slice and Dice

programme.title: Movie: East Side, West Side

programme.title: Movie: Love

programme.title: Movie: The Loneliness of the Long Distance Runner

programme.title: Movie: Lassie Come Home

programme.title: Movie: Little Women

programme.title: Movie: Cynthia
programme.desc: A sheltered girl uses music as a means of winning her independence.

programme.title: Movie: Love Is Better Than Ever
programme.desc: A small-town girl falls for a big-city talent agent.

programme.title: Movie: Butterfield 8
programme.desc: Gloria Wondrous is a young woman tortured by her conflicts between morality and desire. Drifting from one man to another, she finally meets married-man Weston Liggett and, during their six-day fling, her passion turns into love.

programme.title: Movie: The V.I.P.S.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lou's Still the Boss but Now There's a Ross

programme.title: Bunk'd: Rise of the Machine

programme.title: Raven's Home: Say Yes to the Protest
programme.desc: Nia wants to take part in a protest to protect the environment, but first, she has to convince her mom to let her attend.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Man! I Feel Like a Genius

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Before the Beginning

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Blair Bennett: Child Activist

programme.title: Jessie: Badfellas

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Couples & Careers

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: To Infinity and Back
programme.desc: When Claire Throssell meets Darren Sykes, she thinks her future husband's overwhelming displays of affection are signs of love. She fails to see that Darren is out to control her, and if he doesn't get his way, the revenge he takes will be terrible.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Cali-Doe
programme.desc: When a young girl is found murdered in Caledonia NY, police struggle to identify her. The tragedy leads the town make her one of their own, with the name Cali-Doe.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Storm of Rage
programme.desc: A Beautiful young mother vanishes just hours before the deadliest hurricane in Texas history. The investigation forces her loved ones to weather a storm and then survive a tempest.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: To Infinity and Back
programme.desc: When Claire Throssell meets Darren Sykes, she thinks her future husband's overwhelming displays of affection are signs of love. She fails to see that Darren is out to control her, and if he doesn't get his way, the revenge he takes will be terrible.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Cali-Doe
programme.desc: When a young girl is found murdered in Caledonia NY, police struggle to identify her. The tragedy leads the town make her one of their own, with the name Cali-Doe.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Texts, Lies, and Videotape
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears, a series of text messages from her phone lead police to believe she left on her own. Then, her family uncovers evidence that she may have actually been the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Most Evil: Ranked: Chameleon Killers
programme.desc: A look at deceptive killers hiding in plain sight. From manipulators like Darci Pierce and Doyle Kelley, to unsuspecting predator Sylvia White, to infamous serial murderers Son of Sam and BTK.

programme.title: Redrum: A Deadly Drive
programme.desc: In 1991, Conway was a quiet southern town with a tight-knit community. When popular teen Crystal Todd is found murdered, no one, and everyone, becomes a suspect. Has an outsider brought terror to the small town, or should police look closer to home?

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Depths of Evil
programme.desc: As police search for a young mother missing from her home, they never could have imagined the evidence they discovered would put them on the trail of a deadly sexual predator.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Truth Never Dies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found shot to death in her home police are baffled. Then a cryptic letter from a mysterious source sends the investigation down a twisting road to the truth.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones: A Murder and an Open Marriage
programme.desc: Ellen Sherman is found murdered at home while her husband is away sailing. The murder investigation uncovers allegations of wife swapping and multiple affairs. The case goes cold until a famous forensic scientist and a teenager help crack the case.

programme.title: Deadly Women: No Mercy
programme.desc: Some women don't have a kind bone in their body. They take lives without a second thought. A mom sacrifices her son; a greedy book-keeper steals her way to murder and a teen takes her rebellion to shocking heights.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Young Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: They are head over heels in love with their whole lives ahead still ahead of them, but then they die suddenly under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: True Conviction: John is Calling
programme.desc: A nineteen year-old college student and convenience store clerk vanishes in Sheridan, Wyoming.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Suburban Tragedy
programme.desc: In August 2008, newlywed Sarah Widmer died in one of two ways: either she was taking a bath and drowned, or her husband Ryan killed her. Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva investigate to see if there's enough evidence to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Dateline: As Darkness Fell
programme.desc: Mary Beth Harshbarger claimed she accidently shot and killed her husband after she mistook him for a bear on a family hunting trip.

programme.title: Dateline: Vengeance
programme.desc: A woman accuses her boyfriend of raping her and then finds herself on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Key to Murder
programme.desc: Melinda Snyder's death stunned Rock Hill, SC, where even her closest friends came into question. The former homecoming queen's murder embroiled the quiet town in a mystery that wouldn't be settled until the South Carolina Supreme Court weighed in.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Happy Groom
programme.desc: Michael Reese, 40, is a good husband and loving son, who doesn't seem to have an enemy in the world. But when his wife Cindy comes home to find him shot dead, police must grapple with the secrets they uncover one of which led to his murder.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Prey on Tourists
programme.desc: Patsy Jones was the leader of a band of thieves, targeting tourists leaving the Miami airport by robbing and carjacking them at gunpoint. When she murders one of her targets, Jones hides out in an abandoned apartment.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Vacation Homes
programme.desc: William Alderman and his girlfriend broke into vacation homes and used her 3-year-old daughter to help carry out the crimes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: The Loud House: April Fools Rules/ Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House/ In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln must help his sisters get ready faster so they don't miss the bus. Lincoln ends up being the swing vote on where family vacation takes place.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Heroes of Mandalore: Part 1
programme.desc: Sabine leads Ezra, Kanan and an army of her fellow Mandalorians back to her home world to rescue her father from the clutches of the Empire.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Heroes of Mandalore: Part 2
programme.desc: When Sabine discovers the Empire has resurrected a devastating weapon she created and plans to use it against her people, she must decide whether to destroy it or use it herself.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: In the Name of the Rebellion: Part One
programme.desc: As members of the Rebel Alliance, Ezra and the Ghost crew must accept a mission to spy on an Imperial outpost they would rather destroy.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: In the Name of the Rebellion: Part Two
programme.desc: After being separated from Hera and Kana, Ezra and Sabine join the desperate quest of Saw Gerrera to hunt down the Empire's elusive secret super weapon.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: The Occupation
programme.desc: Ezra and the Ghost crew are called back to Lothal when a new Imperial threat rises.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Flight of the Defender
programme.desc: Ezra and Sabine steal an Imperial prototype TIE fighter but must rely on some unexpected help to escape from Thrawn.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Time Crisis/ Gramma Driver
programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Locked On! Lightning Launch!
Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 6
programme.desc: A naked john runs after the prostitute who stole all his clothes, with memories that will linger after the hangover has passed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 7
programme.desc: In an ongoing mission to bring bad behavior to light, The Smoking Gun presents 20 of the World's Dumbest Partiers. This week, an upside-down drinking contest leaves everyone doused with beer. Meanwhile, a drunk Russian woman does an impromptu strip tease.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 8
programme.desc: An over-enthusiastic pole dancer falls off the stage, and a maid of honor faints right in the middle of the vows at her sister's wedding.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Partiers 9
programme.desc: Featuring a man so drunk and lazy he urinates in his own bed, and then climbs in and goes to sleep. Meanwhile, a group of intoxicated college students snowboard down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Modern Family: Princess Party
programme.desc: The guest list for Lily's princess-themed birthday party gets a little out of hand when Mitchell decides to invite his mom, much to Claire's dismay, and disinvite Fizbo, to Cameron's dismay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Regrets Only
programme.desc: When Phil and Claire have a huge fight and Phil has no idea what it was over, Gloria steps in to counsel Phil and Jay takes Claire. Meanwhile, Jay may come to regret buying Gloria a karaoke machine, and Cameron preps for a fundraiser.

programme.title: Modern Family: Two Monkeys and a Panda
programme.desc: While Claire runs herself ragged trying to play peacemaker with Haley and Alex, Phil sneaks off for a relaxing day at the spa. Gloria is horrified by Jay's plans to purchase two primo side-by-side crypts. Cameron decides to become an author.

programme.title: Modern Family: Boys' Night
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are worried when they learn that Luke has befriended their crotchety old neighbour, Mr. Kleezak. Jay's attempt to avoid sitting through a symphony concert with Gloria and Manny lands him in the middle of Mitchell and Cameron's night out.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Musical Man
programme.desc: Cameron is relishing his role as interim music director at Luke and Manny's school a little too much. Jay's brother is in town for a visit, and their relentless brotherly ribbing goes a little too far. Phil convinces the family to be in his realty ad.

programme.title: Modern Family: Someone to Watch Over Lily
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cameron look to assign legal guardians for Lily, in case anything happens to them, and secretly assess their family members. What they witness puts doubts in their minds.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Claire and Gloria want to spend a nice Mother's Day outdoors hiking with the kids, but their non-stop bickering drives Claire to the edge. Phil and Jay stay home to cook everyone a nice dinner, but things turn awkward.

programme.title: Modern Family: Good Cop Bad Dog
programme.desc: Phil and Claire swap parenting roles for the day. Claire will be the fun-loving good cop and Phil the disciplinarian bad cop. Gloria takes in every sob story and stray she comes across, and Jay gives business advice to an overzealous entrepreneur.

programme.title: Modern Family: See You Next Fall
programme.desc: The whole family is gathering at Jay's before heading out to Alex's graduation ceremony from middle school. Jay is preoccupied, hiding a Botox mishap from everyone, and Cameron is upset about Mitchell's habit of laughing at his expense.

programme.title: Modern Family: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Jay wants nothing more than to have a quiet birthday out fishing on the lake, but the family thinks he really wants a big celebration. Claire and Mitchell wind up trapped in the yard of their childhood home. Phil runs into his old college nemesis.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dude Ranch
programme.desc: The family vacations at a dude ranch in Wyoming where Jay squares off against a surprising foe. Mitch and Cam want to share news about their pending adoption plans, but suddenly realize that Lily may not be as ready as they are.

programme.title: Modern Family: When Good Kids Go Bad
programme.desc: Lily strongly disagrees with Mitchell and Cameron when they announce their plan to adopt another child. Manny is suspected of stealing a locket from school, and Jay tries to get him to confess. Claire goes to the extremes to prove she is right.

programme.title: Modern Family: Phil on Wire
programme.desc: The growing bond between Jay and his dog is grating on Gloria's nerves. Phil and Luke embark on a new adventure involving a tightrope, while Claire missteps as she tries to teach the girls a life lesson.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow lifts a woman's spirit and her udderly disastrous sagging breasts while Dr. Nassif does a rhinoplasty on a woman who has beef with her 'pig nose'. Meanwhile, a viral sensation is desperate for help with her 'big booty problems'.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Greed and Bump Its

programme.desc: A love-crazy Canadian uses her boobs to get to Paul and later, former model has nose fixed before her wedding.

programme.title: Botched: Bigger Isn't Breast
programme.desc: A former reality TV star seeks a breast reduction after her boobs got huge on Snapchat and a young woman hopes to enlarge her cross-eyed breasts and start dating again.

programme.title: Botched: Welcome to Jurassic Schnoz
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps an eating disorder survivor feel beautiful in her own skin by downsizing her breasts, while Dr. Nassif sends a 'dinosaur' nose back to the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Botched: Not OK From the UK

programme.title: The Daily Pop

programme.title: Botched: Totally Waist-ed
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a man who just wants his ears back, and Dr. Dubrow hopes to fix a botched butt implant. Afterward, the doctors meet with a woman who has had 17 surgeries to look like the perfect pixie.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New Boobs
programme.desc: Tiffany 'New York' Pollard is back to beat Breast Implant Illness (BII) and go au naturel, while another former patient with over injected lips returns hoping to restore them to normal and a cosplayer needs the Wizard of Boobs to save the day.

programme.title: Botched: Breast Lumps and Empty Noses
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif pulls out all the stops to help a woman headbutted by a bulldog and who is now missing the inside of her nose, while Dr. Dubrow must remove a breast lump in hopes of stopping a leaking nipple.

programme.desc: Mexican top model Carmen Campuzano visits the doctors in hopes of restoring her nose and career, while a discharged soldier wants to mend her butchered breasts to fit in as a civilian.

programme.title: Botched: Viva Las Vegas Boobs
programme.desc: A woman visits the doctors to fix her scarred stomach and popped implant. Then, a police officer wants her nose fixed so she can look like her twin again.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pizza Masters
programme.desc: Four dough throwers compete in a pizza playoff. The chefs make pizza with high-priced toppings and low-priced cheese, a guilty pleasure pizza and an 'out of the pizza box' pizza in the final round when pizza dough is suddenly out of stock.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Heavyweight Teams
programme.desc: Two GGG juggernauts, Alex Guarnaschelli and Rocco DiSpirito, return to compete with their teams of Flavortown regulars.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings Flavortown to the competing all-star chefs by sending them two bulky boxes full of frozen food. In both rounds, the three chefs must convert ice-cold ingredients into dishes that the judges deem delicious.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sibling Supper
programme.desc: A few of Kardea's brothers and sisters are getting together at her place to catch up and share a meal. She's making a slow-roasted onion dip as an appetizer along with grilled garlic bread.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Wadmalaw Days
programme.desc: Kardea invites her mom, grandma and cousin to take a day trip to Wadmalaw Island, where she spent much of her childhood.

programme.title: House Hunters: Pool Dreams in Modesto, Ca
programme.desc: A young Modesto, California, couple want to buy a house that they and their daughter can grow into. They're trying to find a home that has the space he wants and the cozy feel she likes. But above all, the house must have a pool.

programme.title: House Hunters: Bayside or Beachside in Destin

programme.title: House Hunters: Waltzing into a New Home
programme.desc: A ballroom-dancing couple is looking for a move-in ready home closer to their dance studio in New Jersey. She's concerned with making sure the space is warm and inviting, while he's focusing on getting a big kitchen.

programme.title: House Hunters: Firewalking In New Mexico
programme.desc: A woman is on the hunt for a second home outside of Taos, New Mexico. She's hoping to find the perfect place to host retreats in conjunction with her business as a shaman and firewalking instructor.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Sweat Equity

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: In the House Revival

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Battle for the Bathrooms

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Sell or Stay

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: A Forever Home for Two
